csr.subject=/CN=leaf
csr.dns=leaf.example.test
csr.ip=127.0.0.1
csr.public_key_algorithm=rsa
csr.public_key_size_bits=2048
csr.signature_algorithm=sha256
csr.extension_oids=2.5.29.17,2.5.29.15
issue.subject=CN=leaf
issue.result_not_before=2026-06-13T00:00:00Z
issue.result_not_after=2026-06-14T00:00:00Z
issue.cert_not_before=Jun 13 00:00:00 2026 GMT
issue.cert_not_after=Jun 14 00:00:00 2026 GMT
issue.basic_constraints=CA:FALSE
issue.key_usage=Digital Signature, Key Encipherment
issue.extended_key_usage=TLS Web Server Authentication
crl.issuer=/CN=Test CA
crl.number=2147483648
crl.revoked_count=1
ocsp.serial_number=1001
ocsp.hash_algorithm=sha1
ocsp.has_nonce=true
ocsp.nonce_hex=01020304a5
ocsp.response_status=successful
